name: Finnish Pulla (Coffee Bread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together all the ingredients for the dough.
2. Place the dough in a greased baking dish, shaping it into a loaf.
3. Allow the bread to rise until it nearly touches the top of the baking dish. If needed, pierce with a skewer and let some air out.
4. Preheat your oven according to the manufacturer's instructions for your specific model (ABM).
5. Beat 1/4 cup sugar with 1 beaten egg and brush this glaze over the raised bread.
6. Sprinkle additional sugar, poppy seeds, or chopped/sliced almonds on top of the bread before placing it in the oven to bake.
7. If baking in a machine, be cautious not to spill any mixture into the appliance itself while baking.
